settings.label: Shop Name Override

settings.info: The advance booking amount customers pay upfront

settings.info: Displayed across the site as social proof

settings.label: Notification Messages
settings.info: Separate messages with a pipe symbol (|). Use {orders} for random numbers.
settings.default: Someone just bought AirPods Pro 2 in Hyderabad|Only 3 units left at this price!|Free Delivery to Hyderabad ending soon|{orders} people are viewing this product right now
